entries.source:
Chat Edit: '
Used 2 references
To go deeper than research models, I’ll expand the todo list to cover advanced agentic, security, performance, and cross-component scenarios. This will include:

Automated fuzzing and robustness tests
Security audit and sandboxing routines
Multi-agent orchestration and swarm integration
Advanced tracing, diagnostics, and telemetry hooks
Platform-specific optimizations (SIMD, AVX, async IO)
Automated dependency resolution and build matrix
Integration with external analysis tools (static/dynamic)
Documentation and onboarding for agentic workflows
Edge-case simulation (malformed, adversarial, and stress test payloads)
Automated code review and linting for agent-generated code
Versioning, migration, and compatibility checks
Custom extension/plugin registration and lifecycle management
Automated performance benchmarking and regression detection
Multi-language bridge stress and fallback logic
Agent self-healing and recovery routines
I’ll generate and write this expanded todo list next, ensuring coverage for deep agentic, security, and performance research.'
